name: EvoAir Holdings Inc.
summary: PART I Organization and Business Background EvoAir Holdings Inc. (formerly Unex Holdings Inc.) (the Company, EVOH, we, us, or our) is a corporation established under the corporation laws in the State of Nevada, United States of America (U.S) on February 17, 2017. The Company has adopted an August 31 fiscal year end.
